product_overview: A personal wealth management dashboard for tracking assets, net worth, profit/loss, and financial goals in one place. It also provides growth projections so users can estimate when they may reach key targets.
core_goals: Track all personal assets in a single dashboard
View current portfolio value, profit/loss, return, and net worth
Manage financial goals and monitor progress toward each target
Estimate time-to-target and simulate portfolio growth under different scenarios

features.name: User Login
features.description: Sign in with an email and password to access the dashboard.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Fill in email -> Fill in password -> Submit the login form -> See the dashboard
Navigate to /login -> Choose to go to sign up -> See the registration page

features.name: User Signup
features.description: Create a new account with name, email, password, and password confirmation.
user_flows: Navigate to /signup -> Fill in name -> Fill in email -> Fill in password -> Fill in password confirmation -> Submit the registration form -> See the dashboard
Navigate to /signup -> Fill in name -> Fill in email -> Fill in password -> Fill in a different password confirmation -> See inline validation feedback

features.name: Dashboard Overview
features.description: Review the main portfolio summary, including KPI cards, allocation charts, performance tables, and goal progress.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> View KPI cards for total modal, current value, profit/loss, return, net worth, and goal completion -> Hover charts to inspect portfolio breakdowns -> Read the asset performance table -> Review goal progress cards

features.name: Asset Management
features.description: Add, view, search, filter, sort, edit, and delete assets across supported categories.
user_flows: Navigate to /assets -> Add a new asset -> Fill in the asset details -> Submit the asset form -> See the asset appear in the list
Navigate to /assets -> Filter assets by category -> Search assets by name -> Sort the table by a column -> Review the updated asset list
Navigate to /assets -> Open an asset menu -> Choose to edit the asset -> Update the asset details -> Submit the form -> See the changes reflected in the list
Navigate to /assets -> Open an asset menu -> Choose to delete the asset -> Confirm deletion -> See the asset removed from the list

features.name: Update Asset Prices
features.description: Manually update the gold price per gram so asset valuations refresh accordingly.
user_flows: Navigate to /assets -> Open the price update flow -> Edit the gold price per gram -> Save the update -> See updated asset values

features.name: Goal Tracking
features.description: Create, view, update, and delete financial goals, while reviewing progress and key goal-related metrics.
user_flows: Navigate to /goals -> Add a new financial goal -> Fill in the goal details -> Submit the goal form -> See the new goal card with progress information
Navigate to /goals -> Adjust the monthly expense value -> Review the updated emergency fund coverage and FI number metrics
Navigate to /goals -> Open a goal menu -> Choose to edit the goal -> Update the goal details -> Submit the form -> See the updated goal card
Navigate to /goals -> Open a goal menu -> Choose to delete the goal -> Confirm deletion -> See the goal removed from the list

features.name: Growth Projection
features.description: Simulate portfolio growth using different scenarios and monthly contribution settings over multiple time horizons.
user_flows: Navigate to /projections -> Select a growth scenario -> Increase or decrease monthly contribution -> Review the 1-year, 5-year, and 10-year projection cards -> Inspect the 10-year area chart
Navigate to /projections -> Change the scenario selection -> Observe the projection summary values update -> Review the chart for the new growth path

features.name: Theme Toggle
features.description: Switch the app between light and dark appearance modes.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Toggle the theme -> See the interface switch between light and dark mode

routes.description: Email/password sign-in page (redirects to / on success)
Account registration with name, email, password, confirm password

Dashboard — KPI cards (total modal, current value, P/L, return, net worth, goal completion), asset allocation pie, P/L per category bar chart, top performers, asset performance table, goal progress cards
Asset management — per-category summary, filter by category, search, sortable table, add/edit/delete asset, manual price update (gold price/gram)
Financial goals — stats (avg completion, completed count, emergency fund coverage, FI number), monthly expense input, goal cards with progress/milestones/ETA, add/edit/delete goal
Growth projection — scenario selector (conservative/moderate/aggressive), monthly contribution stepper, 1/5/10-year horizon cards, 10-year area chart

features.name: User Login
features.description: Sign in with email and password via better-auth; redirects to dashboard
user_interactions: See inline error on invalid credentials
Click "Daftar" link to go to signup

features.name: User Signup
features.description: Register a new account with name, email, password and confirmation
user_interactions: Fill name, email, password, confirm password
Client-side validation that confirm matches password

features.name: Dashboard Overview
features.description: Portfolio summary KPIs, allocation/P&L charts, top performers, asset table, goal progress
user_interactions: Read asset performance table and goal progress cards

features.name: Asset CRUD
features.description: Create, read, update, delete assets across categories (gold, stock, money market, obligasi, custom); filter, search, sort
user_interactions: Click "Tambah Aset" to open add dialog
Open row menu to Edit or Delete

features.name: Update Asset Prices
features.description: Manually update the global gold price per gram (and asset current values)

features.name: Goal CRUD
features.description: Create, read, update, delete financial goals with target amount, current amount, target date, icon
user_interactions: Click "Tambah Target" to open add dialog
Adjust monthly expense input to recompute emergency fund / FI metrics
Open goal menu to Edit or Delete

features.name: Growth Projection
features.description: Simulate portfolio growth under conservative/moderate/aggressive scenarios with adjustable monthly contribution over 1/5/10 years
user_interactions: View horizon summary cards and 10-year area chart

features.name: Theme Toggle
features.description: Switch between light and dark mode (next-themes)
user_interactions: Click theme toggle to switch light/dark

known_limitations.issue: Mutations are optimistic and errors are only logged to console, not surfaced in the UI
known_limitations.impact: Failed asset/goal create/update/delete shows no user-facing error

known_limitations.issue: Monthly expense on Goals page and monthly contribution on Projections are not persisted
known_limitations.impact: Values reset on reload; emergency-fund and FI metrics are session-only

known_limitations.issue: App running in Next.js dev mode during testing
known_limitations.impact: Single-threaded server may be unstable under concurrent test load; TestSprite caps to 15 tests
